name: red metal room
description: I'm in a red metal room
hints: A red metal room with a control console. The red coloring distinguishes this area from the regular metal rooms.
Examine the control console carefully. It may have buttons, dials, or displays to interact with.
PUSH BUTTON or USE CONSOLE to interact with the controls. Go EAST to explore the adjacent red room, or SOUTH to return to the tunnel.
notes: Red metal room with control console. Part of a distinct section of the ship. South leads to tunnel (room 19), east leads to another red room (room 13). The console here may control ship systems.
